title: hymenasplenium retusulum
intro: Hymenasplenium retusulum, also known as the Retusum spleenwort, is a species of fern in the family Aspleniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal preparation methods.
